subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-16 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Say: Let Me behold what thou doest. What hast thou accomplished this day? The Exalted One declareth that man must, day by day, take account of his deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بگو ببینم چه می کنی.  امروز چه کرده ئی.  حضرت اعلی می فرمایند که انسان باید هر روز اعمال خود را بسنجد
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @bringing oneself to account each day, @spiritual transformation
